================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 45 F4 1B 08 FF
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x1B
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 27

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1875
ReflectedCC  : 0x1B
PayloadLen   : 27

[EPS P60] Unknown CC: 0x1B

[PAYLOAD HEX]
01 01 50 46 50 46 50 46 50 46 50 46 50 46 00 00 
D8 40 AC 3F 32 00 00 00 E8 03 01 

[RETURN VALUE]
01 01 50 46 50 46 50 46 50 46 50 46 50 46 00 00 
D8 40 AC 3F 32 00 00 00 E8 03 01 

[BINARY DATA]
